definition: To reduce in intensity, amount, or degree
exampleSentence: The storm began to abate after several hours of heavy rain.

definition: Well-meaning and kindly; generous
exampleSentence: The benevolent donor gave millions to the children's hospital.

definition: Truthful and straightforward; frank
exampleSentence: She gave a candid interview about her struggles in school.

definition: Having or showing care and effort in one's work
exampleSentence: The diligent student spent hours preparing for the exam.

definition: Difficult to find, catch, or achieve
exampleSentence: The elusive butterfly escaped every attempt to catch it.

definition: Not having any serious purpose or value
exampleSentence: The judge dismissed the frivolous lawsuit immediately.

definition: Fond of company; sociable
exampleSentence: Her gregarious personality made her popular at every party.

definition: To hinder or impede the movement or progress of
exampleSentence: The heavy snow hampered rescue efforts in the mountains.

definition: About to happen; impending
exampleSentence: The dark clouds suggested that a thunderstorm was imminent.

definition: Feeling or expressing great happiness and triumph
exampleSentence: The team was jubilant after winning the championship game.

definition: Eager or enthusiastic; sharp or penetrating
exampleSentence: She has a keen interest in marine biology.

definition: To express sorrow or regret about something
exampleSentence: The students lamented the cancellation of the field trip.

definition: Showing great attention to detail; very careful
exampleSentence: The meticulous artist spent weeks perfecting every brushstroke.

definition: Feeling or appearing casually calm and relaxed
exampleSentence: He gave a nonchalant shrug when asked about the difficult test.

definition: Giving the impression that something bad is going to happen
exampleSentence: The ominous silence in the forest made the hikers uneasy.

definition: Acting with or showing care and thought for the future
exampleSentence: It would be prudent to save money for unexpected expenses.

definition: Complaining in a whiny manner
exampleSentence: The querulous child complained about everything during the trip.

definition: Able to recover quickly from difficult conditions
exampleSentence: The resilient community rebuilt after the devastating flood.

definition: Briefly and clearly expressed
exampleSentence: The professor's succinct explanation made the concept easy to understand.

definition: Holding firmly to something; persistent and determined
exampleSentence: The tenacious athlete trained every day despite her injury.
